inclusion_criteria: Study design: randomized controlled trials, nonrandomized comparative studies, or prospective/retrospective cohort pre–post studies in humans published in peer‑reviewed journals
Population: adults (≥18 years) with morbid obesity (BMI ≥40 or ≥35 with obesity‑related comorbidities) undergoing primary laparoscopic vertical sleeve gastrectomy (LVSG)
Comparator: preoperative status (baseline before LVSG), either within-subject pre–post or an explicit preoperative control group
Outcomes: reports at least one of LESP, LESL (via conventional or high‑resolution manometry), DeMeester Score (via ambulatory pH monitoring), or BMI change
exclusion_criteria: Non-LVSG bariatric procedures, revisional or mixed procedures, or studies where LVSG-specific data cannot be isolated
No preoperative comparator or none of the specified outcomes (LESP, LESL, DMS, BMI) reported
Non-original publications (reviews, meta-analyses, editorials/letters), conference abstracts only, or case reports/series
Non-human studies or pediatric populations (<18 years)
screening_criteria.description: Screen studies enrolling morbidly obese adults undergoing primary LVSG that compare postoperative with preoperative measures and report esophageal physiology (LESP/LESL/DMS) and/or BMI change using accepted testing methods.
